name: Email Validator
description: Comprehensive email validation API that checks syntax, MX records, SMTP servers, and detects disposable or role-based email addresses in real-time.
shortDesc: Validate email addresses and detect disposable domains

params.name: check_smtp
params.desc: Perform an active SMTP check. Default: true

howItWorks: Submit an email address via POST
Our system performs a regex syntax check
We query the domain's DNS to verify MX records
We ping the SMTP server (without sending an email) to ensure the mailbox exists
We cross-reference the domain against our database of 50,000+ disposable email providers
